Package org.eventb.internal.ui

Class EventBUIExceptionHandler

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.EventBUIExceptionHandler
public class EventBUIExceptionHandler extends Object

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness
    The enumerated type UserAwareness specifies the awareness level of user in handling exceptions.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static void
    handleCoreException(org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException exception, String msg, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness level)
    Utility method for handling Core Exceptions (except RodinDB Exceptions).
    static void
    handleCreateElementException(Exception e)
    Handle exception throws when creating an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
    static void
    handleDeleteElementException(Exception e)
    Handle exception throws when deleting an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.

    handleException(Exception e, String msg, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness level)
    Utility method for handling exceptions in general.
    static void
    handleException(Exception e, String message, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness, String debugPrefix)
    Handle an exception with some options.
    static void
    handleGetAttributeException(org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException e, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness)
    Handle exception throws when getting an attribute of an element.
    static void
    handleGetAttributeException(RodinDBException e)
    Handle exception throws when getting an attribute of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
    static void
    handleGetChildrenException(Exception e)
    Handle exception throws when getting children of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
    static void
    handleGetChildrenException(RodinDBException e, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness)
    Handle exception throws when getting children.
    static void
    handleGetPersistentPropertyException(Exception e)
    Handle exception throws when getting persistent property with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#IGNORE.
    static void
    handleRemoveAttributeException(Exception e)
    Handle exception throws when removing an attribute of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
    private static void
    handleRodinDBException(RodinDBException exception, String msg, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness level)
    Utility method for handling exception when accessing Rodin Database.
    static void
    handleRodinException(RodinDBException e, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness)
    Handle exception throws when accessing Rodin DB (in general).
    static void
    handleSetAttributeException(Exception e)
    Handle exception throws when setting an attribute of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
    static void
    handleSetPersistentPropertyException(Exception e)
    Handle exception throws when setting persistent property with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#IGNORE.

    • EventBUIExceptionHandler

      public EventBUIExceptionHandler()

  • Method Details

    • handleException

      private static void handleException(Exception e, String msg, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness level)
      Utility method for handling exceptions in general. Depending on the types of the exceptions, call the appropriate utility methods.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.
      msg - a string message.
      level - the level of awareness.

    • handleCoreException

      private static void handleCoreException(org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException exception, String msg, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness level)
      Utility method for handling Core Exceptions (except RodinDB Exceptions).
      Parameters:
      exception - the exception in consideration.
      msg - a string message.
      level - the level of awareness.

    • handleRodinDBException

      private static void handleRodinDBException(RodinDBException exception, String msg, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness level)
      Utility method for handling exception when accessing Rodin Database.
      Parameters:
      exception - the exception in consideration.
      msg - a string message.
      level - the level of awareness.

    • handleCreateElementException

      public static void handleCreateElementException(Exception e)
      Handle exception throws when creating an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleDeleteElementException

      public static void handleDeleteElementException(Exception e)
      Handle exception throws when deleting an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleSetAttributeException

      public static void handleSetAttributeException(Exception e)
      Handle exception throws when setting an attribute of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleGetPersistentPropertyException

      public static void handleGetPersistentPropertyException(Exception e)
      Handle exception throws when getting persistent property with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#IGNORE.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleSetPersistentPropertyException

      public static void handleSetPersistentPropertyException(Exception e)
      Handle exception throws when setting persistent property with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#IGNORE.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleGetChildrenException

      public static void handleGetChildrenException(Exception e)
      Handle exception throws when getting children of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleRemoveAttributeException

      public static void handleRemoveAttributeException(Exception e)
      Handle exception throws when removing an attribute of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleGetAttributeException

      public static void handleGetAttributeException(RodinDBException e)
      Handle exception throws when getting an attribute of an element with a default level of awareness as UserAwareness.#INFORM.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.

    • handleGetAttributeException

      public static void handleGetAttributeException(org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException e, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness)
      Handle exception throws when getting an attribute of an element.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.
      awareness - the level of awareness.

    • handleRodinException

      public static void handleRodinException(RodinDBException e, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness)
      Handle exception throws when accessing Rodin DB (in general).
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.
      awareness - the level of awareness.

    • handleGetChildrenException

      public static void handleGetChildrenException(RodinDBException e, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness)
      Handle exception throws when getting children.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception in consideration.
      awareness - the level of awareness.

    • handleException

      public static void handleException(Exception e, String message, EventBUIExceptionHandler.UserAwareness awareness, String debugPrefix)
      Handle an exception with some options.
      Parameters:
      e - an exception
      message - the message related to the exception
      awareness - the level of awareness
      debugPrefix - the debug prefix. If it is null then no debug message will be printed. Otherwise the message will be printed with this prefix.
